title: DADS React Samples
summary: Official React/TypeScript/Storybook example components for DADS, demonstrating token usage, testable component code, and documented React 18→19 compatibility caveat. MIT-licensed repository pushed 2026-07-15.
lessons: Link guidance to executable Storybook stories and tests for verifiable component conformance.
Preserve the source's status as sample snippets — not a claim of full DADS conformance.
caveats: These are sample snippets with documented React 18→19 compatibility caveats; do not treat as a drop-in production library.
Repository is actively maintained but component coverage may not match the full DADS specification.
licenseNote: MIT license on the official repository.
antiImitationNote: Transfer testable component patterns and DADS token usage examples; do not import government-specific component implementations as AwesomeDS defaults.
